title: Interior Rain Sound Fix
description: This is a mod that lower the volume of rain when inside a building.
body:
# Interior Rain Sound Fix
This mod lower the sound of the rain when your are inside a building.

You will need: 
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
- [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)
- [Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net/)

## Know bugs
- Rain sound is mufling under trees
